infotexts.BetterFabricatorUI.PinyinSearchEnabled.D: Enable Pinyin Search For Fabricator Recipe
infotexts.BetterFabricatorUI.PinyinSearchEnabled.T: Allows you to search for recipes using the full Pinyin spelling, initials, or first letters of Chinese characters as keywords. Once enabled, typing "chuansong" or "cs" will quickly get "传送" (teleport/transmission) and similar terms.
